item.description: FIFA reversed a ban against Team USA’s star striker Folarin Balogun, who was set to sit out Monday’s game over a controversial red card. President Trump called FIFA’s president last week and asked him to review the red card according to a source familiar with the phone call. NBC News’ Dana Griffin reports.

media:content.media:title: FIFA reverses ban against U.S. men’s soccer star
media:content.media:description: FIFA reversed a ban against Team USA’s star striker Folarin Balogun, who was set to sit out Monday’s game over a controversial red card. President Trump called FIFA’s president last week and asked him to review the red card according to a source familiar with the phone call. NBC News’ Dana Griffin reports.

item.title: FIFA reverses ban against U.S. men’s soccer star

item.description: Erling Haaland volvió a aparecer para liquidar el partido. El delantero noruego sacó un potente disparo raso desde fuera del área para marcar el 2-0 sobre Brasil y sellar el pase de Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: ¡Doblete de Haaland! Noruega sentencia a Brasil y aseguran el pase a cuartos
media:content.media:description: Erling Haaland volvió a aparecer para liquidar el partido. El delantero noruego sacó un potente disparo raso desde fuera del área para marcar el 2-0 sobre Brasil y sellar el pase de Noruega a los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: ¡Doblete de Haaland! Noruega sentencia a Brasil y aseguran el pase a cuartos

item.description: El entrenador Thomas Tuchel previene que los jugadores ingleses pueden resentir la altitud de la capital en los primeros 20 minutos, pero se adaptarán. Sobre la alineación, Tuchel aifrma que necesitan a los 16 convocados para enfrentar a México.

media:content.media:title: Tuchel rota jugadores: “Hoy necesitamos a los 16 para sacar esto adelante”
media:content.media:description: El entrenador Thomas Tuchel previene que los jugadores ingleses pueden resentir la altitud de la capital en los primeros 20 minutos, pero se adaptarán. Sobre la alineación, Tuchel aifrma que necesitan a los 16 convocados para enfrentar a México.

item.title: Tuchel rota jugadores: “Hoy necesitamos a los 16 para sacar esto adelante”

item.description: En la previa del Inglaterra vs. México por los octavos de final, Kane habló sobre el reto de jugar en el Estadio Azteca. El delantero aseguró que su equipo buscará mantener la calma en los primeros minutos y “callar” a la afición mexicana con su juego.

media:content.media:title: Harry Kane sobre el Azteca: “Vamos a intentar callar a la afición mexicana”
media:content.media:description: En la previa del Inglaterra vs. México por los octavos de final, Kane habló sobre el reto de jugar en el Estadio Azteca. El delantero aseguró que su equipo buscará mantener la calma en los primeros minutos y “callar” a la afición mexicana con su juego.

item.title: Harry Kane sobre el Azteca: “Vamos a intentar callar a la afición mexicana”

item.description: Jorge Valdano elogió el funcionamiento defensivo de la Selección Mexicana, destacando que el equipo no ha recibido goles en el torneo. Además, analizó el reto que representa enfrentar a Harry Kane y una Inglaterra que exigirá la mejor de México.

media:content.media:title: Jorge Valdano: "El funcionamiento de la defensa es impecable"
media:content.media:description: Jorge Valdano elogió el funcionamiento defensivo de la Selección Mexicana, destacando que el equipo no ha recibido goles en el torneo. Además, analizó el reto que representa enfrentar a Harry Kane y una Inglaterra que exigirá la mejor de México.

item.title: Jorge Valdano: "El funcionamiento de la defensa es impecable"

item.description: 40 años después, la selección inglesa regresa al Estadio Azteca para enfrentarse al anfitrión mexicano. El último juego disputado en tierras capitalinas, Inglaterra cayó ante Argentina después de la mítica ‘Mano de Dios’.

media:content.media:title: Inglaterra arriba al Estadio Azteca para enfrentar a México en octavos de final
media:content.media:description: 40 años después, la selección inglesa regresa al Estadio Azteca para enfrentarse al anfitrión mexicano. El último juego disputado en tierras capitalinas, Inglaterra cayó ante Argentina después de la mítica ‘Mano de Dios’.

item.title: Inglaterra arriba al Estadio Azteca para enfrentar a México en octavos de final

item.description: Javier Aguirre destacó la importancia del duelo de México ante Inglaterra en el Azteca y pidió concentración total a sus jugadores. El técnico aseguró que el equipo ha venido mejorando y adelantó una posible duda con César Montes.

media:content.media:title: Aguirre: “Este partido en el Azteca va a ser irrepetible”
media:content.media:description: Javier Aguirre destacó la importancia del duelo de México ante Inglaterra en el Azteca y pidió concentración total a sus jugadores. El técnico aseguró que el equipo ha venido mejorando y adelantó una posible duda con César Montes.

item.title: Aguirre: “Este partido en el Azteca va a ser irrepetible”

item.description: Nuestros expertos analizan la previa del México vs Inglaterra, un partido que promete hacer historia en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. La pasión se vive al máximo en la ciudad y todo está listo para un duelo que podría marcar un antes y un después.

media:content.media:title: México e Inglaterra, ¿el partido más importante en la historia del país? | Enlace Mundial
media:content.media:description: Nuestros expertos analizan la previa del México vs Inglaterra, un partido que promete hacer historia en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. La pasión se vive al máximo en la ciudad y todo está listo para un duelo que podría marcar un antes y un después.

item.title: México e Inglaterra, ¿el partido más importante en la historia del país? | Enlace Mundial

item.description: Aquí no es así y México llega al mítico Estadio Azteca con el objetivo de eliminar a la Inglaterra de Harry Kane y Jude Bellingham. Aguirre y compañía van por la hazaña.

media:content.media:title: ¿Y si sí? México llega al Coloso de Santa Úrsula en busca de hacer historia ante Inglaterra
media:content.media:description: Aquí no es así y México llega al mítico Estadio Azteca con el objetivo de eliminar a la Inglaterra de Harry Kane y Jude Bellingham. Aguirre y compañía van por la hazaña.

item.title: ¿Y si sí? México llega al Coloso de Santa Úrsula en busca de hacer historia ante Inglaterra

item.description: Jesús Gallardo aseguró que México llega con confianza e ilusión al duelo ante Inglaterra. El lateral destacó el gran momento del equipo, el respaldo de la afición y afirmó que este es un día para hacer historia.

media:content.media:title: Jesús Gallardo: “Hoy veremos la mejor versión de México”
media:content.media:description: Jesús Gallardo aseguró que México llega con confianza e ilusión al duelo ante Inglaterra. El lateral destacó el gran momento del equipo, el respaldo de la afición y afirmó que este es un día para hacer historia.

item.title: Jesús Gallardo: “Hoy veremos la mejor versión de México”

item.description: Davide Ancelotti habló tras la eliminación de Brasil y aclaró que el cobrador del penal ya estaba definido antes del partido. Además, reconoció la calidad de Erling Haaland y lo difícil que es frenar a un jugador de nivel mundial.

media:content.media:title: Davide Ancelotti tras la eliminación de Brasil: “Pequeños errores te dejan fuera”
media:content.media:description: Davide Ancelotti habló tras la eliminación de Brasil y aclaró que el cobrador del penal ya estaba definido antes del partido. Además, reconoció la calidad de Erling Haaland y lo difícil que es frenar a un jugador de nivel mundial.

item.title: Davide Ancelotti tras la eliminación de Brasil: “Pequeños errores te dejan fuera”

item.description: Marquinhos lamentó la derrota 2-1 ante Noruega y asumió la responsabilidad por la eliminación de Brasil. El defensor reconoció la falta de eficacia, pidió perdón a la afición y aseguró que ahora comienza un nuevo ciclo.

media:content.media:title: Marquinhos: “Es inexplicable lo que pasó”
media:content.media:description: Marquinhos lamentó la derrota 2-1 ante Noruega y asumió la responsabilidad por la eliminación de Brasil. El defensor reconoció la falta de eficacia, pidió perdón a la afición y aseguró que ahora comienza un nuevo ciclo.

item.title: Marquinhos: “Es inexplicable lo que pasó”

item.description: Iranians gathered for a funeral to honor their late supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Three of his four sons attended the service, but questions remain about the new supreme leader who was notably absent. NBC News’ Richard Engel reports from Tehran.

media:content.media:title: Iranians mourn former Supreme Leader
media:content.media:description: Iranians gathered for a funeral to honor their late supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Three of his four sons attended the service, but questions remain about the new supreme leader who was notably absent. NBC News’ Richard Engel reports from Tehran.

item.title: Iranians mourn former Supreme Leader

item.dc:creator: Kayla Hayempour
Mark Hodge
Jeremy Mikula
item.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday night delivered an address for America’s 250th birthday on a day roiled by severe weather — from triple-digit temperatures to pouring rain.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-ANNIVERSARY-250
media:content.media:description: An attendee holds up an American flag as he waits for US President Donald Trump to speak during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026. The nation is marking the 250th anniversary of the United States Declaration of Indpendence.

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.

media:content.media:text: Serena Williams.
media:content.media:description: Serena Williams plays last week at Wimbledon in London.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

media:content.media:title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding
media:content.media:description: NBC News is learning new details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at New York City’s Madison Square Garden from two guests who were there. The bride and groom both wore white and the entertainment was provided by Stevie Nicks and Paul McCartney. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports in this week’s Sunday Focus.

item.title: What We Know About Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Fourth of July celebrations across the country were marred by violence that killed at least five people and injured scores in multiple cities.

media:content.media:text: Two NYPD cars drive on the street at night
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: 8 wounded in mass shooting on July 4th holiday in New York's Coney Island
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A car is seen on fire while parked on the street
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

item.title: A deadly Fourth of July as at least six killed in shootings and explosions that wound dozens

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Jay Blackman
item.description: The aircraft landed safely and taxied to the gate, the airline said, adding that the incident is under review.

media:content.media:text: Delta Air Lines At Los Angeles International Airport
media:content.media:description: A Delta Air Lines Boeing 767 taxis at Los Angeles International Airport after arriving from New York on September 1, 2024 in Los Angeles, California.

item.title: Firework strikes Delta flight landing at Chicago’s Midway Airport

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
Christine Rapp
item.description: At least 18 record highs were set on July Fourth as celebrations kicked off in mid-Atlantic cities, including Washington and Baltimore.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: A young visitor shields themself from the sun in during July 4th celebrations in Washington, D.C. on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A Tribute To America On The National Mall In D.C. Celebrates America's 250th
media:content.media:description: Visitors grab bottles of cold water at the Great American State Fair on the National Mall on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Dust blowing into the air through a crowd of people on the National Mall.
media:content.media:description: Visitors shield themselves from dust blown into the air by high winds from a passing storm during July Fourth celebrations on the Mall on Saturday.

item.title: 25 dead in ongoing heat wave as storms bring flood and wind threats to the East Coast

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang
item.description: Fourth of July celebrations across the country were marred by violence that killed at least five people and injured scores in multiple cities.

media:content.media:text: Two NYPD cars drive on the street at night
media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.

media:content.media:text: A car is seen on fire while parked on the street

item.title: A deadly Fourth of July as at least six killed in shootings and explosions that wound dozens

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: The best 4th of July sales are happening now. Our editors found worthwhile deals on Apple, Yeti, Medicube and more.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

media:content.media:text: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.
media:content.media:description: Plenty of major retailers are hosting sales for the Fourth of July, including Target, Amazon, Best Buy and REI.

item.title: The best Fourth of July sales to shop right now

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: The scenes were hard to watch inside MetLife Stadium on Sunday as Brazilian fans were seen in tears towards the end of the match, many leaving early in a sign of complete resignation.

media:content.media:text: A group of soccer fans wearing the colors of Brazil's team reacting with dismay.
media:content.media:description: Brazilian fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: Endrick splayed on his stomach on the soccer pitch, his eyes closed.
media:content.media:description: Brazilian fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: A triptych image of Team Brazil players.
media:content.media:description: Brazilian fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

media:content.media:text: A soccer fan covers his face with his t-shirt while reacting to gameplay.
media:content.media:description: Brazilian fans at a watch party in the Tijuca neighborhood of Rio de Janeiro on Sunday. For decades, Brazil has given fans one of the most thrilling styles of play — especially in high-stakes tournaments such as the World Cup.

item.title: Brazil’s loss to Norway leaves players and fans distraught and searching for answers

item.dc:creator: Kayla Hayempour
Mark Hodge
Jeremy Mikula
item.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday night delivered an address for America’s 250th birthday on a day roiled by severe weather — from triple-digit temperatures to pouring rain.

media:content.media:text: US-POLITICS-ANNIVERSARY-250
media:content.media:description: An attendee holds up an American flag as he waits for US President Donald Trump to speak during the "Salute to America" Independence Day celebration on the National Mall in Washington, DC, on July 4, 2026. The nation is marking the 250th anniversary of the United States Declaration of Indpendence.

media:content.media:text: Michigan State Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.
media:content.media:description: Michigan state Sen. Mallory McMorrow speaks at the Democratic National Convention on Aug. 19, 2024.

media:content.media:text: Serena Williams.
media:content.media:description: Serena Williams plays last week at Wimbledon in London.

item.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend

item.dc:creator: Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The administration has faced scrutiny for awarding a multimillion-dollar, no-bid contract to a company that previously worked on Trump properties.

media:content.media:text: A U.S. National Park Service employee uses a vacuum pump to clean algae off the bottom of the newly repainted Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool
media:content.media:description: Pieces of the blue paint have come loose since work on the pool concluded, and algae bloomed in the water, giving it a bright green shade.

media:content.media:text: Chipped paint and algae are visible in the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Pieces of the blue paint have come loose since work on the pool concluded, and algae bloomed in the water, giving it a bright green shade.

item.title: Interior secretary says administration will use the same company to repair Reflecting Pool

item.dc:creator: Marlene Lenthang

media:content.media:text: Two NYPD cars drive on the street at night

media:content.media:description: NYPD officers work at the scene after eight people, including four children, were shot in a mass shooting in Brooklyn's Coney Island neighborhood Saturday.
